name: Starter Coding
description: Template prompts for practical coding help and debugging.

prompts.title: Bug diagnosis
prompts.prompt: This function sometimes returns the right result and sometimes returns None. Walk me through how you would debug it before suggesting a fix.

prompts.title: Small refactor
prompts.prompt: I have a messy helper that does three related things. How would you decide whether to split it up or leave it alone?

prompts.title: Readable code
prompts.prompt: Explain how you would make this code easier to read without changing behaviour or doing a broad redesign.

prompts.title: Test choice
prompts.prompt: What focused tests would you add for a small persistence bug where saved settings reload incorrectly after refresh?

prompts.title: Trade-off
prompts.prompt: Should I add a new abstraction here or just duplicate a few lines? Give me a practical engineering judgement, not a generic rule.
